hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '/src/.*\.ts$' && echo "$f" | grep -qvE '__tests__' && npm test -- --reporter=dot src/__tests__/router.test.ts src/__tests__/chunker.test.ts src/__tests__/frame-parser.test.ts; } 2>/dev/null || true

OUTPUT=$(npm test 2>&1); EXIT=$?; echo "$OUTPUT" | tail -5; if [ $EXIT -ne 0 ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Tests failed — fix before committing"}}'; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running full test suite before commit...

hooks.command: printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"⚠️ MERGE GATE: Before merging, confirm that /pre-merge-testing has been run for this branch. If not, run it now before proceeding. This is a mandatory acceptance test step."}}'
